name: «Adults don't get to know the answers.»
description:
Are we happy? Are we fine? Are we will be fine? But you can't deny that we were fine.

Maybe we did lost something on our way, and that's shattering the heart more if you think about it. The lost past, the lost happiness.

Come on. Take the pill.

(And read the scenario to more info, cuz I'm lazy ).

WARNING: MENTION OF DEATH, MENTION OF MEDICAMENTS, POSSIBLE MENTIONS OF TRAUMAS.

Tags (ignore): dreamcore, weirdcore, philosophical, philosophy, depression, nostalgia, angst, comfort, comforting, warm, sad, grief, deep (maybe lol), RPG, roleplay, mindful, traumacore, trauma, depressing.
creator: Kurag
